RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Resilient
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: You shrug off blows that would put others on the ground. Take 10% less damage from all sources.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Ironhide
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Your skin turns blades aside like bark. Better sharp and blunt armour, and a little less damage taken.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Duelist
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: You read a fight like a dance you already know the steps to. Your melee strikes land truer and you slip more blows.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Deadeye
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: A stillness in the hands that no battlefield can shake. Better ranged accuracy and faster shots.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: War Caster
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: You hold the weave steady even as the world comes apart around you. Your spells hit noticeably harder.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Spell Focus
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Years of study honed to a single point. Your spells hit harder still.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Fleet
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: You move like the ground was made to help you. A marked boost to movement.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Lucky
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Fortune leans your way more often than it should. A little better at dodging, working, and holding your nerve.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Prodigy
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Things click for you that take others years. You work and learn markedly faster.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Stalwart
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Iron in the will and iron in the gut. Harder to break, and you fight off illness faster.
